import{API_URL}from'./config';export const adminAPI={getUsers:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/users"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch users');}return response.json();},deleteUser:async(userId,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/users/").concat(userId),{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to delete user');}},deleteEvent:async(eventId,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/event/").concat(eventId),{method:'DELETE',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to delete event');},getAllEvents:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/events"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch events');}const data=await response.json();return data.events||[];},approveEvent:async(eventId,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/events/").concat(eventId,"/approve"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to approve event');}return response.json();},// AI Configuration
getAIConfig:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/ai-config"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch AI config');return response.json();},saveAIConfig:async(config,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/ai-config"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(config)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to save AI config');return response.json();},testAIConfig:async(config,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/ai-config/test"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(config)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to test AI config');return response.json();},// Fetcher Status
getFetcherStatus:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/fetcher/status"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch status');return response.json();},// Populate Town
populateTown:async(townData,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-town"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(townData)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to populate town');return response.json();},getTownStatus:async(town,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/town-status/").concat(town),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get town status');return response.json();},// Dragons Unleashed
dragonsUnleashed:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/dragons-unleashed"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to unleash dragons');return response.json();},// Cache Management
getCacheStats:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/cache/stats"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get cache stats');return response.json();},clearCache:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/cache/clear"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to clear cache');return response.json();},// Stats (optional queryString for city/country filter, e.g. "city=Porto&country=Brazil")
getStats:async(token,queryString)=>{const qs=queryString?"?".concat(queryString):'';const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/stats").concat(qs),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get stats');return response.json();},// Unified Fetcher - consolidated multi-API event fetching
unifiedFetch:async(params,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/unified-fetch"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(params)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to start unified fetch');return response.json();},getUnifiedSources:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/unified-sources"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get unified sources');return response.json();},// Populate World — Python Serpents across all countries
populateWorld:async(params,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-world"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(params)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to start world population');return response.json();},// Populate Country — deep state-level population via Python Serpents
populateCountry:async(params,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-country"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)},body:JSON.stringify(params)});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to start country population');return response.json();},// Get list of available countries for population
getPopulateCountries:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-countries"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get countries list');return response.json();},// Get current populate status (world and per-country)
getPopulateStatus:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-status"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get populate status');return response.json();},// Jobs API: list jobs, get a job, resume a job
getPopulateJobs:async function(token){let limit=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:20;const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-jobs?limit=").concat(limit),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to list populate jobs');return response.json();},getPopulateJob:async(id,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-job/").concat(id),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get job');return response.json();},resumePopulateJob:async(id,token)=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/populate-job/").concat(id,"/resume"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to resume job');return response.json();},// ── HOT REFRESH — restart Node / rebuild React without Docker rebuild ──
refreshNode:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/refresh-node"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});// Note: the server may close the connection before we read the response
// because it's about to restart. That's expected behavior.
try{if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to trigger Node refresh');return response.json();}catch(_unused){return{ok:true,message:'Node.js is restarting...'};}},refreshReact:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/refresh-react"),{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to trigger React rebuild');return response.json();},getRefreshStatus:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/refresh-status"),{headers:{Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to get refresh status');return response.json();},// Crawler/Fetcher control - proxied through Node.js backend
startCrawler:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/fetcher/start"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to start crawler');return response.json();},pauseCrawler:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/fetcher/pause"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to pause crawler');return response.json();},resumeCrawler:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/fetcher/resume"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to resume crawler');return response.json();},stopCrawler:async token=>{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_URL,"/api/admin/fetcher/stop"),{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json',Authorization:"Bearer ".concat(token)}});if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to stop crawler');return response.json();}};
